message.content:
This is a FINAL pre-production review. Read each file carefully and report any bugs, crashes, or issues that would break the app in production.

Files to review (read each one):

1. `client/src/App.tsx` — main app shell with auth, tab navigation, lazy loading, swipe, toast, popups
2. `client/src/components/Dashboard.tsx` — dashboard with profile, morning feed, streaks, achievements, profile image upload
3. `client/src/components/MorningFeed.tsx` — morning feed cards
4. `client/src/components/DecodeLogo.tsx` — SVG logo
5. `client/src/data/daily-feed.ts` — curated feed data + getTodayFeed()
6. `client/src/store.ts` — UserProfile interface, localStorage helpers
7. `client/src/index.css` — all CSS (check for missing classes, broken layouts)
8. `client/src/animations.css` — animation keyframes
9. `src/routes.ts` — backend profile route with profile_image validation
10. `client/index.html` — font loading, meta tags

Focus on:
- Will this crash in production? Any undefined references, missing imports, type errors?
- Are there race conditions in the useEffect hooks?
- CSS: any layout-breaking issues on mobile (iPhone SE, small Android)?
- Is the profile image upload flow complete end-to-end (upload → resize → save to BQ → load back)?
- Does the feed rotation work correctly for edge cases (Jan 1, Dec 31, leap year)?
- Any security issues (XSS via profile_image, injection via feed data)?

Report ONLY real bugs that would affect production users. Skip style preferences.
